title: Daily Independent Journal — July 26, 1960 (Page 4)
author: Daily Independent Journal
card_summary: A clipped page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Tuesday, July 26, 1960, page 4. Likely related to Philip K. Dick or his local environment during his years living in the Marin County area of California.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Tuesday, July 26, 1960, page 4. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 5, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This clipping dates from the summer of 1960, during Dick's residence in the Marin County area of California. The Daily Independent Journal documented local news, community events, and cultural life in the San Rafael area where Dick lived and worked. Clippings from this period are preserved to provide contextual documentation of Dick's environment during one of his most important creative periods.
